questionHtml: Explain why it would be uncomfortable for the farmer to drive the vehicle at a speed of 5.6 m s–1.
markschemeHtml:
ALTERNATIVE 1

the time between undulations is 3 5.6 = 0.536 «s»

f =  1 0.536 = 1.87 «Hz»

«frequencies match» resonance occurs so amplitude of vibration becomes greater

Must see mention of “resonance” for MP3

ALTERNATIVE 2

f =  v λ = 5.6 3

f = 1.87 «Hz»

«frequencies match» resonance occurs so amplitude of vibration becomes greater

Must see mention of “resonance” for MP3
